name: RPlog_Taking_Chances
title: Taking Chances
summary: On dusty Tatooine, Corellian smuggler Paul Nighman and his young companion Shenner -- a redheaded girl disguising herself as a boy -- set out from the loaned shuttle Darklighter to find their quarry Grathix while awaiting Luke Skywalker. A long breakfast at the Dockside Cafe in Mos Eisley introduces the broke mercenary Wookiee Burrachacca and his crewmates, before Paul and Shenner head back to ship and share a tender, vulnerable interlude of massage and confession in which Shenner admits she wants to be with Paul. Setting out again to secure a hotel room, the pair are ambushed in the street by the Mandalorian Dane Noth, who stuns Paul in a brief firefight and hauls him captive into the Twin Suns Hotel and Casino. There it emerges the abduction was a clumsy summons from Grathix, who only wished to question Paul about ancient artifacts; Luke vouches for them, Grathix apologizes, and the unconscious Paul is laid up in a suite where Shenner keeps anxious vigil until he wakes, the night ending with the two falling asleep in each other's arms.
